description: Add(Player player) does not validate that 'player' is not null before accessing player.Id. A null argument would throw a NullReferenceException instead of the expected ArgumentNullException.
suggestedFix: Add 'ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(player);' as the first line inside the Add method (before the lock).

description: Update(Player player) does not validate that 'player' is not null before accessing player.Id. A null argument would throw a NullReferenceException instead of the expected ArgumentNullException.
suggestedFix: Add 'ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(player);' as the first line inside the Update method (before the lock).
